workspace_picker.title: Pick your workspace
workspace_picker.empty: You have no workspaces. Create one.

create.title: Create Address
create.description: Choose the inbox name and check the full address before creation.
create.domain_description: New addresses currently use {domain}. Connect a domain before creating addresses for another email domain.
create.success: {address} is ready as a frontend preview.

validation.address_format: Use letters, numbers, dots, underscores, or hyphens.

errors.workspace_access: This workspace either does not exist or you don't have access to it.
errors.email_taken: This email address is already taken.
errors.address_domain_required: Select a verified domain for this workspace.
errors.address_create_failed: We could not create this address right now. Please try again.
errors.short_address_failed: We could not create a short address URL right now. Please try again.
errors.workspace_update_permission: You do not have permission to update workspace settings.
errors.workspace_delete_permission: You do not have permission to delete this workspace.
errors.domain_add_permission: You do not have permission to add domains.
errors.domain_add_failed: We could not add this domain right now. Please try again.
errors.domain_verify_permission: You do not have permission to verify domains.
errors.verification_txt_missing: The verification TXT record was not found yet.
errors.dns_check_failed: DNS records could not be checked yet.
errors.domain_delete_permission: You do not have permission to delete domains.
errors.domain_delete_addresses: Remove addresses on this domain before deleting it.
errors.remove_self: You cannot remove yourself from the workspace.
errors.member_remove_permission: You do not have permission to remove workspace members.
errors.owner_remove_denied: The workspace owner cannot be removed.

email.empty_description: Send a message to this address and it will appear here.

sample_emails.daily_deliverability_snippet: Your inbound route accepted 284 messages today with no deferred deliveries.
sample_emails.migration_snippet: Thanks for the update. The workspace handoff looks clean on our side.
sample_emails.invoice_snippet: Your invoice and usage details are attached for the current billing period.

settings.title: Workspace settings
settings.description: Update the workspace profile, public handle, and destructive settings for {workspaceName}.
settings.general_description: Rename the workspace and update the details shown to members.
settings.workspace_handle_help: Used in workspace URLs and default selfmail addresses.
settings.load_error: Workspace settings could not be loaded.
settings.save_error: Workspace settings could not be saved.
settings.delete_description: Delete this workspace when you no longer need it. This action cannot be undone.
settings.delete_confirm_description: This permanently deletes the workspace. You will lose access to its settings and related workspace data.
settings.delete_unavailable: Only members with workspace deletion permission can delete it.
settings.readonly_description: You can review workspace details, but you do not have permission to edit them.
settings.workspace_data_description: Review the current workspace footprint and export the data connected to your user.
settings.export_error: Workspace data could not be exported.
settings.export_description: Includes your member profile, addresses, emails, contacts, drafts, notifications, and SMTP credential metadata. Passwords are redacted.
settings.danger_zone_description: Delete this workspace and its related addresses, domains, drafts, members, billing records, and stored mailbox data.

member_settings.remove_success: {memberName} has been removed from the workspace.
member_settings.copy_user_id_error: User ID could not be copied.
member_settings.remove_description: {memberEmail} will lose access to this workspace and its addresses.
member_settings.add_description: Add members with the email address they already use for Selfmail.
member_settings.add_dialog_description: Use the email address this person already uses to sign in.
member_settings.email_duplicate: This email is already listed for this workspace.
member_settings.staged_description: The member appears as pending until invitations are connected.
member_settings.pending_banner: Pending members are only shown in this session until invitations are connected.
member_settings.empty_description: Invite members to share workspace access.

domains.invalid: Enter a valid domain, without https://.
domains.cloudflare_description: Add these DNS records to {domain} in Cloudflare.
domains.add_description: Enter the email domain you want to verify for this workspace.
domains.create_records_description: Add these records, then verify the domain.
domains.verified_description: The domain is ready for new workspace addresses.
domains.manage_description: Review DNS records and verification status.
domains.delete_draft_description: This removes the pending domain draft from the workspace.
domains.delete_domain_description: This removes the verified domain from the workspace. Domains with addresses cannot be deleted.
domains.intro: Verify DNS before using custom domains for new email addresses.
domains.empty_description: Add a domain draft, create the DNS records, then verify it.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Use your system appearance or choose a fixed app theme.
theme.toggle_auto_label: Theme mode: auto (system). Click to switch to light mode.

language.description: Choose the language used across the app.

member_settings.description: Personal member profile, access, and notification preferences.

spam_analysis.description: Review and configure spam detection for this workspace.

custom.label: Use a custom email domain
custom.help: Selfmail stays hosted by Selfmail. This only connects your domain for email addresses.
